name: Mohit Sharma
title: Postdoctoral Researcher
tagline: Scientific visualization and topology-based analysis of multivariate scientific data.
bioShort: I develop scalable and interactive methods for visual analysis of multivariate scientific data, with emphasis on Reeb spaces, Jacobi sets, contour trees, extremum graphs, continuous scatterplots, and topology-driven visual analytics.
bioLong: Mohit Sharma is a postdoctoral researcher at Linköping University, Sweden. He completed his Ph.D. at the Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore, advised by Prof. Vijay Natarajan, with a thesis on topological structures and operators for bivariate data visualization. His research lies at the intersection of scientific visualization, computational topology, and real-world scientific applications in chemistry, medical imaging, climate science, and simulation data. Before his doctoral studies, he worked in industry at MediaTek, Amazon, Adobe, and Directi.
